title: Britain records hottest day of 2026 as 35C heatwave scorches London, Kent and Southeast England
summary_full: Britain is experiencing its hottest weather of 2026, with temperatures soaring across England and parts of the country potentially reaching 35C. Official heatwave conditions have been declared in southern and eastern England, prompting amber heat-health alerts due to the extreme heat and potential strain on services.
